Matched
0 C 0n
1 C 1n
2 C 2n
3 C 3n
4 C 4n
5 C 5n
6 I 0
7 I 1

Applying to 01110001
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 C 0n = NOT(1) = 0
1 C 1n = NOT(1) = 0
2 C 2n = NOT(1) = 0
3 C 3n = NOT(1) = 0
4 C 4n = NOT(1) = 0
5 C 5n = NOT(1) = 0
6 I 0 = 0
7 I 1 = 1

\boxed{00000001}
